text:
5 PRs merged this week. The big one: we added a quest system. You can now earn Pollen for doing things around the ecosystem—check the public catalog to see what's what. We also gave the API docs a visual upgrade so the icons actually align, and finally fixed that annoying dashboard bug where it would forget who you were mid-navigation. Memory restored.

Code is open, as always. Link in bio.

#pollinations #opensource #aitools #pixelart #creativecoding #indiedev #buildinpublic #webdev #retroaesthetic #gamification
